title: 日本ダービーの後に・昇り炎舞

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O and Mejiro Ardan run with
abandon, and not to be outdone, Yaeno Muteki
reveals her competitive spirit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan takes first place. Yaeno Muteki
thanks her friends, claiming that their passion
brought a great run out of her as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But while she may have had an amazing run, she
confides in me that she was beginning to lose
control of herself. She's nervous about what might
happen in the future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest that we work on the balance of the
blaze fierce and water still within her to address
her concerns. Yaeno Muteki agrees, saying she
was thinking the same thing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that decided, we turn our attention to the
Kikuka Sho... only to be told a few days later that
both Sakura Chiyono O and Mejiro Ardan will be
sitting out due to their injuries.
